description: I've found my new AI-superhero. I am absolutely obsessed with this tool and think it is the luster that is missing from ChatGPT3. I love the ability to change the tone of the email in order to apply it to different audiences that all need to receive the same message. Not to mention changing the language? As a realtor with Spanish-speaking clients for whom I have to manually translate a lot of information for, this is an absolute gamechanger! This has also been a godsend for me as a ADHD sufferer that struggles to write the simplest of emails sometimes. Communication is a huge part of relationship building and sending out one-size-fits-all emails that are tailored specifically to YOU are always fun to read and increase feelings of bonding that humanize the situation. Yep, all through email.
author: Michelle N.
pros: The biggest impact is the simplicity of the product and how easy it is to use. I usually don't pay much attention to add-ins for Outlook to be honest, but the colorful logo pulled me in and I'm glad it did. I love the ability to change the tone of the email and even the language!
cons: I genuinely don't see how it can be improved for what it is. It is the PERFECT Microsoft add-in. Now, if it was or is going to be a standalone product then it is a great starting point for building in many new wonderful features but I personally don't think anything is wrong with it as-is.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: So far so good. This has been a great product to use compared to others out there. It makes it very easy to respond to emails without needing to sit down and properly write out the perfect response. I just put in what I want to say and amazingly, it creates exactly what I am looking for.

review_title: MailMaestro is a really quick and easy way for folks to dip their toes into AI for email
description: MailMaestro is a dead simple to use and integrates with traditional email platforms like desktop outlook. If you're curious about AI email authoring, but don't want to commit to spending much if anything - MailMaestro is a great place to start.
author: Josh J.
pros: The outlook add-in is fantastic and allows me to pop open a MailMaestro window quickly - tell it what I want it to produce and in what tone - then it instantly fires it back at me for potential inclusion in an email. It's seamless and can really save time structuring and writing emails that are thoughtful and thorough.
cons: I wish there were more options and training that can happen to teach MailMaestro what I like and expect from it's generated content.
author_profession: Manager of Web Communications and Online Marketing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
